name: bugloop
description: Critical bug hunt profile: find concrete high-severity bugs, fix minimally, validate, commit, and continue until a bounded confidence target or stop condition.
default_done_when: >=95% high-severity confidence, max cycles reached, or no plausible critical candidates remain.
safety_notes: Never push, deploy, force-push, delete data, or change global config without explicit user authorization.
Commit only one confirmed and validated bug fix per commit.
Rollback failed attempts without touching unowned user changes.
